subcodes.first_line: Blessed is the heart that hath attained union with the Most Great Ocean, and the eye that hath beheld the proof of its Lord, the Almighty, the All-Powerful. Blessed is the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: طوبی لقلب اتصل بالبحر الاعظم و لعین رات برهان ربها المقتدر القدیر طوبی لفواد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @thankfulness; gratitude, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @chastisement and requital
